data.body:
Much like films, I would like to see horror games not rely so heavily on jump-scares and very loud sounds to create scares and tension.
When used properly, a jump-scare can be incredibly effective.
But I would love to see them explore more ways to create fear and tension for the viewer/player.

data.body:
Magical item: Oath Keepers Ring

A magical ring that once worn on any finger links itself to the wearer.

The ring can be thrown, tossed, or dropped by the wearer which summons a low level spirit fighter who is sworn to protect to wearer.

If the spirit is defeated, the ring becomes mundane.
